description.ko: 사이버네틱 정원에서 씨앗처럼 정보를 퍼뜨리는 디지털 식물의 미세한 모습입니다.
description.en: A microscopic view of a digital plant that disperses information like seeds in a cybernetic garden.

prompt: A hyper-macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a sentient digital dandelion. The seeds are made of #89CFF0 fiber-optic cables that pulse with liquid data, swaying in a digital breeze. The stem is constructed from #50C878 emerald circuit boards, set against a dark #4A0E4E velvet void. Glowing #FFB6C1 fractal pollen particles drift in a soft-focus bokeh effect of falling binary code. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, a perfect fusion of organic nature and advanced technology.
